story: Ava planted tomato seeds in the spring. She watered them every morning. The plants grew tall by July. Small green tomatoes appeared on the vines.

choices.label: A
choices.text: Ava picked ripe tomatoes later that summer.

choices.label: B
choices.text: Ava decided tomatoes only grow in the winter.

label: A
answer: Ava picked ripe tomatoes later that summer.

story: Leo forgot his umbrella at home. Dark clouds filled the sky after lunch. Rain started while he walked to the bus stop. His jacket was soaked.

choices.label: A
choices.text: Leo got wet in the rain.

choices.label: B
choices.text: Leo stayed perfectly dry without shelter.

label: A
answer: Leo got wet in the rain.
